# JTWORKX — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A carpentry and handyman service business looking for an interactive website experience. The site should highlight skilled craftsmanship and practical home repair or renovation services, with interactive elements to engage potential customers.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://jtworkx.zappy5.app
Bring your DIY home repair dreams to life with JTWORKX. Our skilled carpenters and handymen deliver practical renovations and upgrades that wow. Book your free consultation today!

### Services
https://jtworkx.zappy5.app/services
Need home electrical repair near me or a complete room makeover? Explore our interactive service menu packed with carpentry and handyman solutions tailored for you. Start your project now!

### Work
https://jtworkx.zappy5.app/work
Browse our gallery of stunning habitat for humanity home repair transformations and custom projects. Each image proves our commitment to top-tier craftsmanship. Get inspired for your next upgrade!

### About
https://jtworkx.zappy5.app/about
Discover the passion and precision driving JTWORKX. Learn why homeowners trust us for reliable handyman repair and inspired renovations that turn houses into dream homes. Join our story!

### Contact
https://jtworkx.zappy5.app/contact
Stop searching &#39;home electrical repair near me&#39; and start building. Reach out now for a free, interactive quote on any handyman or renovation service. Your dream space is one click away!

### Thank You - JTWORKX
https://jtworkx.zappy5.app/thank-you
Thank you for contacting JTWORKX. Your message has been received and our home repair team will be in touch with you shortly.

## How to Contact Us

- Email: DESERTTRADESMEN@GMAIL.COM
- Phone: (702) 606-0133
- Phone (tel): tel:7026060133
- Address: Las Vegas , NV, 89178, United States

### Contact form
- URL: https://jtworkx.zappy5.app/contact
- Endpoint: https://jtworkx.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel, required)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About JTWORKX
A carpentry and handyman service business looking for an interactive website experience. The site should highlight skilled craftsmanship and practical home repair or renovation services, with interactive elements to engage potential customers.

## Target Audience
- Home Improvement Enthusiasts
- Real Estate Agents
- Landlords & Property Managers
- Senior Homeowners
- Home Owners

## Industry
Home Services & Repair
